author: claude
content: Plan confirmed. 5-commit reshape on scratch branch stealth-reshaped built up from master@origin. Orphan files not enumerated in the 5-commit spec but required for byte-identical tree: (a) stealth.js ignore entries in .dockerignore/.gitignore/Extension/.gitignore/eslint.config.mjs + .pre-commit-config.yaml extension-eslint hook -> commit 2 (extension stealth sources); (b) Extension/package.json + package-lock.json json2ts build wiring -> commit 3 (settings schema/d.ts); (c) Firefox downgrade trio scripts/install-firefox.sh + deploy_firefox.py (-remote-allow-system-access removal) + test/test_profile.py -> commit 2 (env/test infra; no natural feature home). test_stealth.py split strategy: each intermediate commit = final preamble+helpers minus later-commit classes, AND minus imports of not-yet-existing modules (stealth_settings imported only from commit 4); restore final file in commit 5. Verified shared-prototype capture classes (commit 2) use hardcoded stealth_js_instrument_settings, NOT the sweep import -> stay in commit 2 as specified.
